trip.notes: Pool-based lineup updated 2026-05-27. Every restaurant lives in its real price band ($$ Refined / $$$ Elevated / $$$$ Signature). Each night displays the full pool; you pick what you want at the price you want — nothing is pre-selected. Restaurants closed on a given night's weekday are dimmed.

restaurants.name: The Shed
restaurants.address: 113½ E Palace Ave, Santa Fe, NM 87501

booking.note: Dinner is phone reservations or walk-in; call (505) 982-9030. Closed Sundays.

notes: 70-year Santa Fe institution since 1953
Red chile enchiladas are the order
End the trip on the food you came for: red chile enchiladas
Tuesday is the calmest service night

restaurants.name: Anasazi Restaurant
notes: Rosewood Inn of the Anasazi hotel restaurant
Open daily 5–9:30pm — useful arrival-night fallback close to Plaza
Peer review note: setting and convenience are the credentials, not the cooking

restaurants.name: Sazón
notes: Chef Fernando Olea — 2022 James Beard Best Chef Southwest
#1 restaurant in Santa Fe on Tripadvisor
Mon–Sat, last seating 8pm
Business-casual dress code; no children under 10

restaurants.name: La Boca
restaurants.address: 72 W Marcy St, Santa Fe, NM 87501
notes: Chef James Campbell Caruso — 8× James Beard Best Chef SW nominee (2008–2014)
Canyon Road's best Spanish offering now that El Farol is closed
Sister bar Taberna next door for cocktails

restaurants.name: Wolf and Roadrunner
restaurants.address: 210 Don Gaspar Ave, Santa Fe, NM 87501

booking.note: Rebranded from Tabla de los Santos. Thu–Sun only.

notes: Replaces Tabla de los Santos (rebrand, 2025)
Wood-fire / seasonal concept
Thu–Fri 3–8pm, Sat–Sun 1–8pm

restaurants.name: The Compound

booking.note: Phone reservations preferred: (505) 982-4353. Not on OpenTable.

notes: **Blowout meal of the trip.** 2024 James Beard Outstanding Restaurant finalist — one of five in the country
Chef-owner Mark Kiffin — 2005 JB Best Chef Southwest winner
500+ wine selections
Closed Sundays
Historic adobe compound on Canyon Road
The peer review's confirmed best farewell meal
2024 James Beard Outstanding Restaurant finalist
If already used Thu Jun 4 — Sazón is the alternate farewell

restaurants.name: Zacatlán
notes: Chef Eduardo Rodriguez (former Coyote Cafe exec sous) — 2024 James Beard Best Chef SW nominee
Mole-driven, whole red snapper, Cochinita Pibil
Distinct from Sazón — Railyard setting, à la carte focus

restaurants.name: Joseph's Culinary Pub
restaurants.address: 428 Agua Fria St, Santa Fe, NM 87501
notes: Chef Joseph Wrede — Food & Wine Best New Chef 2000, multi-year JB semifinalist (2008, 2010, 2025)
Duck confit pad thai is the signature
Wed–Sun 5–9pm

restaurants.name: Geronimo
notes: 1756 adobe — irreplaceable setting
Elk tenderloin, Maine lobster tails
Entrees $44–$64
25+ years of consistent fine dining
One of the few Canyon Road Signature rooms open Sundays
1756 adobe; elk tenderloin

restaurants.name: Cowgirl BBQ
restaurants.address: 319 S Guadalupe St, Santa Fe, NM 87501

booking.note: OpenTable for parties of 5+; smaller parties may walk in

notes: Live music weekend patio
Locally beloved low-key option
Genuine Santa Fe contrast night

restaurants.name: Izanami
restaurants.address: 21 Ten Thousand Waves Way, Santa Fe, NM 87501

booking.note: Pair with a Ten Thousand Waves spa visit.

notes: 2014 James Beard Best New Restaurant semifinalist
Mountain-spa setting unique to the Southwest
About 4 miles north of Plaza — book a car

restaurants.name: Alkemē at Open Kitchen
restaurants.address: 227 Don Gaspar Ave, Santa Fe, NM 87501
notes: Chef-Owner Hue-Chan Karels — 2024 James Beard Best New Restaurant semifinalist
Three rotating 5-course tasting menus, $75–$85 plus wine
Santa Fe's only serious tasting-menu destination
Tue–Sat, last seating 8:45pm

restaurants.name: Cafe Pasqual's
restaurants.address: 121 Don Gaspar Ave, Santa Fe, NM 87501

booking.note: Open Sundays — one of the few top spots that is

notes: Katharine Kagel — 1999 James Beard Best Chef SW nominee
Mural-covered, communal-table icon
Reservations strongly recommended for dinner

restaurants.name: Coyote Cafe & Rooftop Cantina
restaurants.address: 132 W Water St, Santa Fe, NM 87501

booking.note: Rooftop Cantina is seasonal walk-in only — main dining room books.

notes: Mark Miller's 1987 Southwest classic — coasting on 1990s reputation per recent local critics
Open Sundays, useful when other top kitchens are dark
Demoted from Signature after peer review

restaurants.name: Restaurant Martín

booking.note: Ask for the tasting menu when booking

notes: Chef Martín Rios — multi-year James Beard Best Chef SW nominee (2015–2018, 2022)
Tasting menu format is the way to go for a farewell
Wed–Sun (Tue June 9 — confirm open)

nights.label: Wed Jun 3 — Arrival dinner
nights.theme: Near the Plaza, low-key after the flight.

nights.label: Thu Jun 4 — Canyon Road night
nights.theme: Adobe and lamplight, oldest dining street in town.

nights.label: Fri Jun 5 — Railyard night
nights.theme: Downtown's modern side, gallery openings, contemporary cooking.

nights.label: Sat Jun 6 — Spa night
nights.theme: Ten Thousand Waves: hot tubs at dusk, dinner at Izanami.

nights.label: Sun Jun 7 — Plaza wander
nights.theme: Galleries open late, slow Sunday pace. Many top kitchens are closed today.

nights.label: Tue Jun 9 — Farewell dinner
nights.theme: Last night in Santa Fe — go out properly.

preDinnerDrinks.name: Secreto Lounge
preDinnerDrinks.address: 210 Don Gaspar Ave (Hotel St. Francis), Santa Fe, NM 87501
preDinnerDrinks.note: Famous smoked sage margarita. Walk-in cocktails before dinner — NOT positioned as a dinner restaurant (food service is intermittent). Reclassified from main rotation after peer review.

removed.name: El Farol
removed.reason: Permanently closed November 12, 2025. Building listed for sale at $2.5M.

removed.name: La Choza
removed.reason: Redundant with The Shed (same family, near-identical menu). Locally called 'massively overrated' with 90-minute waits.

removed.name: Luminaria Restaurant & Patio
removed.reason: Over-tiered at Signature. OpenTable prices it $31–$50, not $$$$. Pattern of service failures in 2024–2025 reviews. New management as of early 2025 with kinks to work out. Removed from both slots.

removed.name: Tabla de los Santos
removed.reason: Rebranded to Wolf and Roadrunner (same address, new concept, now on Resy not OpenTable). The new identity is carried in the Thu Jun 4 Elevated slot.

considered.name: Arroyo Vino
considered.note: 4.9 / 2,025 OpenTable reviews — highest in Santa Fe. Wine-pairing destination near Opera grounds. Hold for a future build or a 7th-night addition.

considered.name: Market Steer
considered.note: Locally praised steakhouse. Not yet in the lineup because the current 6 nights are full and cuisine balance favors Southwest + Asian + Spanish over a steakhouse-focused night.
